title: Non-Classical NLP Approaches vs. Classical Pipeline
description: A flowchart comparing the linear, modular stages of classical NLP with the integrated, end-to-end nature of modern non-classical (neural/Deep Learning) approaches.
elements: Classical NLP Pipeline (Modular Steps: Tokenization, POS Tagging, Parsing, etc.)
relationships: Contrasts the sequential, hand-engineered feature processing of classical methods with the monolithic, representation-learning approach of modern neural models
